faqs.title: Frequently asked questions
faqs.subtitle: Common questions about the cost calculator and employment costs

items.question: What does the cost calculator include?
items.answer: The calculator includes income tax (employee deductions), employee and employer social security, and optional benefits. It shows net salary to the employee and total employer cost per year for the selected country.

items.question: Are the tax and benefit rates exact?
items.answer: Rates are estimated averages for 2025 and may vary by salary level, region, exemptions, and employee profile. Use the results as a planning guide; we provide exact quotes and payroll advice when you engage our services.

items.question: Which countries are supported?
items.answer: The calculator currently covers 12 major markets. We support employment and payroll in 160+ countries-contact us for a detailed quote for any country.

items.question: How do I get a detailed quote?
items.answer: Use the 'Get detailed quote' button or contact us with your country, headcount, and role details. Our team will provide a tailored cost breakdown and guide you through next steps.

items.question: Why do net and total cost differ?
items.answer: Net salary is what the employee receives after income tax and employee social security. Total employer cost includes employer social security, benefits, and any other statutory costs-so it is higher than gross salary.

items.question: Can I compare multiple countries at once?
items.answer: Use the calculator for one country at a time to see detailed breakdowns. For multi-country comparison, contact us with your list of countries and we'll provide a side-by-side cost summary.

items.question: Are benefits mandatory in every country?
items.answer: Statutory benefits vary by country. The calculator allows you to add common benefits; we can confirm what is mandatory in your target country when you request a quote.

items.question: How often are calculator rates updated?
items.answer: We update rates when tax or social security rules change, typically at least annually. For critical planning, always confirm current rates with our team when you're ready to hire.

cta.title: Ready to hire globally?
cta.description: Get a detailed quote tailored to your specific needs. Our team will provide you with a comprehensive cost breakdown and help you navigate global employment.
